query: SELECT stepKey, body FROM message_templates WHERE flowType = 'review';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT stepKey, body FROM message_templates WHERE flowType = 'review';

rows.body: Hi [Name]! 🏠 How did your cleaning go today? We'd love to hear your feedback — just reply and let us know!

That's wonderful to hear, [Name]! 🎉 Since you're happy with the clean, we'd love if you could leave us a quick Google review — it really helps our small business grow. As a thank-you, we'll give you 10% off your next booking. Here's the link: [GoogleReviewUrl] — once you've left a review, just reply and we'll apply your discount right away!
We're so sorry to hear that, [Name] — that's not the experience we want for you. A member of our team will reach out shortly to make it right. 💛
Thank you so much, [Name]! 🌟 Your 10% discount is saved for your next booking — just mention it when you're ready to schedule and we'll take care of you. See you next time!
You've been unsubscribed and won't receive further messages from us. Have a great day! 🏠

stdout:
stepKey	body
review_initial	Hi [Name]! 🏠 How did your cleaning go today? We'd love to hear your feedback — just reply and let us know!
review_positive_response	That's wonderful to hear, [Name]! 🎉 Since you're happy with the clean, we'd love if you could leave us a quick Google review — it really helps our small business grow. As a thank-you, we'll give you 10% off your next booking. Here's the link: [GoogleReviewUrl] — once you've left a review, just reply and we'll apply your discount right away!

review_opt_out	You've been unsubscribed and won't receive further messages from us. Have a great day! 🏠
